name: vn-stock-trader
description: Vietnamese stock market analysis and trading tools for Claude Code — real-time data, technical/fundamental analysis, portfolio management, and automated monitoring for HOSE, HNX, UPCOM

plugins.name: vn-stock-trader
plugins.description: Complete Vietnamese stock trading toolkit — 11 MCP tools (price, history, financials, news, screener, portfolio, insider trades), 10 auto-trigger skills (TA, FA, news impact, portfolio review, sector compare, morning brief, session summary, portfolio monitor, watchlist), 8 slash commands (/analyze, /screen, /portfolio, /news, /compare, /report, /alert, /trading-session), 4 specialized agents (market-watcher, news-analyst, portfolio-manager, research-agent)
